description: Read the bug/improvement backlog, pick the next highest-priority item or module batch, implement it, verify it, and keep the backlog and atlas in sync.
request:
Implement FE-REV-005 as one bounded single-agent batch.

Target backlog item:
- FE-REV-005 | Lead-gen and partner pages

Scope:
- /Users/macbook/Desktop/Huz/Huz-Web-Frontend/src/pages/VisaServices/VisaServices.jsx
- /Users/macbook/Desktop/Huz/Huz-Web-Frontend/src/pages/ContactUs/ContactUs.jsx
- /Users/macbook/Desktop/Huz/Huz-Web-Frontend/src/pages/HajjUmrahBusiness/HajjUmrahBusiness.jsx
- /Users/macbook/Desktop/Huz/Huz-Web-Frontend/src/pages/ListPackagePage/ListPackagePage.js

Required outcomes:
- Align these pages to the Huz design system and shared shell patterns.
- Preserve intentional CTA destinations and outbound partner links.
- Replace placeholder local-submit behavior and inert CTA behavior only with deliberate, documented behavior changes.
- Do not introduce accidental new network side effects.
- Keep the batch single-agent and bounded to this scope only.

Verification requirements:
- Route tracing for touched paths.
- Import tracing for shared-shell adoption.
- Frontend build or equally strong scoped verification if the run decides a build is not necessary.
- Update BUG_BACKLOG and RUN_SUMMARY with exact outcomes and the next recommended batch.

phases.title: Select Backlog Target
phases.goal: Pick the next backlog item or safe batch to implement.
required: Read the backlog and current atlas docs first.
Choose the highest-priority item or the requested module-specific batch.
Confirm the scope, expected behavior, and required verification before editing code.

phases.title: Implement the Fix
phases.goal: Apply the selected backlog fix across the necessary modules.
required: Implement the minimum coherent code changes required to resolve the selected backlog target.
Keep diffs scoped to the chosen item or batch.
If new adjacent bugs are discovered, fix them only if they block the selected work or record them in the backlog.

phases.title: Verify and Update Backlog
phases.goal: Run validations, confirm the fix, and update the backlog state.
required: Run the relevant build, test, lint, typecheck, or smoke commands for the affected scope.
Update the backlog status, verification notes, and any residual risk.
Refresh the atlas docs if routes, APIs, structure, or ownership changed.

phases.title: Summarize and Queue Next
phases.goal: Leave the backlog ready for the next fix run.
required: Append a detailed summary of the implemented fix and how it was verified.
Record the next recommended backlog target.
Ensure future runs can continue without rescanning the entire project.
